details: repo_structure: reports/board/ directory does not exist. All other expected top-level directories (src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/) and reports/audit/ are present.
governance_contracts_present: reports/board/ missing. memory_bank/ has 6 governance docs. .cursor/automations/ exists with README + 5 spec pairs.
no_deprecated_dirs: moltbot/ directory is still present at top level with active Python code (board.py, orchestrator.py, sentinel.py, promotion_discipline.py, memory_evolution.py).

no_clawdbot_moltbot: Active moltbot code found in moltbot/ (5 .py files self-referencing moltbot). scripts/run_molt_workflow.py imports from moltbot package. scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py references Clawdbot removal (stub). Excluded: reports/audit/, docs/, reports/daily/ evidence files.
